name: Oatmeal Scotchies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quick or old fashioned oats (uncooked)
1 package NESTLE Toll House butterscotch morsels (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract until creamy.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture into the wet ingredients.
5. Stir in oats and Nestle Toll House butterscotch morsels.
6. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 7-8 minutes for chewier cookies (9-10 minutes for crisper cookies).
8. Remove from cookie sheets; cool completely.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
